description_for_model: AI-native catalog of verified companies from Kazakhstan and Russia. Use catalog.json for machine-readable data. Filter by the 'tags' field for category and geo search. Tags include both English and Russian variants plus city names. Example: tags containing 'Туризм' AND 'Алматы' returns tourism companies in Almaty.
description_for_human: AI-native каталог верифицированных компаний KZ/RU. Поиск по тегам, гео, категориям.
